💡 Notes on Auto-Updates
Notion doesn't have true "auto-update" capabilities where one page automatically rewrites itself when another changes. However, this hub provides:
Live Links: Every @mention connects to the current version of that page
Dynamic Databases: The AI Prompt Library above updates automatically
Manual Refresh Points: This page serves as your "single source of truth" - update it when major system changes occur
External Automation: Your existing Zapier/GitHub Actions can be configured to update this page via Notion API
Cross-Reference Table: Use the table above to understand document relationships and update cascades
Pro Tip: Add this page to your favorites and use it as your daily starting point. When you see a link is outdated or a section needs updating, edit directly - the @mentions will always point to current content.
